maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Free users: Limited to 10 items (preview). Paid users: Optional, max 1,000,000.

keywordFilter.title: Keyword filter (optional)
keywordFilter.description: Only return posts whose URL slug contains this string. Leave empty to include everything.
keywordFilter.sectionDescription: Discovery is sitemap-based. Use the keyword filter to narrow the URL slugs returned.
